summary.summary: Adds optional glucose forecast display to the Live Activity (lock screen) widget and the supporting data/path plumbing. Changes include new Live Activity content state fields (minForecast, maxForecast, forecastLines, forecastDisplayType), DataManager logic to prefetch and compute forecast arrays and cone bounds, DeterminationData/attributes updates to carry forecasts, chart rendering in LiveActivityChartView to draw either a cone (AreaMark) or per-type lines (LineMark), and a new user setting to toggle sending/displaying forecasts from Settings > Notifications > Live Activity. Several follow-up commits adjust payload size and safety (mutually exclusive cone vs lines, cap at 24 points), color and visibility fixes (inline RGB for widget bundle, hide iob when cob/uam present), clamp forecast Y-axis to chart thresholds, and localization strings.
summary.userFacingImpact: A new setting "Display Glucose Forecasts" (default OFF) appears under Settings > Notifications > Live Activity; when enabled the Live Activity lock screen chart can show Oref forecasts either as a cone or as lines (display mode follows the existing Forecast Display Type setting). Forecast data is gated by the new setting and the payload was made payload-safe by sending only cone bounds or line arrays per update and capping forecast length (24 points). The PR author requests more testers and a code review before broad deployment.
